tool_args.label: LIRR M-9 Railcar Project
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR M-9 Project - The M-9 trains are a key part of the LIRR's modernization strategy

payload.description: Procurement of 202 M-9 EMU railcars (92 base + 110 option) for LIRR electric territory, including Grand Central Madison. Supplier: Kawasaki.

tool_args.label: NYCT R211 Subway Car Program
tool_args.raw_text: NYCT R-211 Project - Base Order of 535 Cars (61 trains), including: 440 R211A Standard Cars, 75 R211S Staten Island Cars, 20 R211T Open Gangway Test Cars. Option 1 of 640 R211A Cars exercised in November 2022. Supplier: Kawasaki.

payload.status: In progress - Base Order Completion January 2025
payload.description: R211 program includes 535-car base order (440 R211A, 75 R211S, 20 R211T) plus Option 1 of 640 R211A cars exercised November 2022. Supplier: Kawasaki.

tool_args.label: SC42 Dual Mode Locomotive Project
tool_args.raw_text: SC42 Dual Mode Locomotive Project - Current order: 19 locomotives base order, along with 8 locomotive option exercised March 2021. Supplier: Siemens.

payload.status: In progress - Base Order Completion Q2 2027
payload.description: Procurement of 19 SC42 Dual Mode locomotives base order plus 8 option exercised March 2021 for Metro-North Railroad. Supplier: Siemens. Replaces aging P32 locomotives.

tool_args.label: MTA New Bus Program
tool_args.raw_text: MTA New Bus Program - MTA operates the largest bus fleet in the country

payload.description: New bus procurement program covering clean-diesel, hybrid, battery-electric, articulated, and express buses across NYCT/DOB and MTA Bus Company.

tool_args.label: Coney Island Yard Sandy Repair/Mitigation
tool_args.raw_text: Coney Island Yard: Overall, the project is 98% complete, with a current budget and Estimate at Completion (EAC) of $524.4M

payload.project_name: Coney Island Yard: Sandy Repair/Mitigation and CBHs
payload.description: Storm recovery and resiliency protection at Coney Island Yard facility. Budget/EAC $524.4M.

tool_args.label: 207th Street Yard

payload.description: Rehabilitation of the 207th Street Yard. Budget/EAC $643M.

tool_args.label: BMT Traction Power Control System Upgrade
tool_args.raw_text: BMT Traction Power Control System Upgrade C34866/7 - The project will improve reliability and operation of the existing BMT traction power control system

payload.project_name: BMT Traction Power Control System Upgrade C34866/7
payload.description: Replace antiquated Master Terminal Units at Power Control Center with touchscreen LED monitors and video wall, construct new Emergency Backup Power Control Center. EAC $55M.

tool_args.label: UHF T-Band Radio System Replacement
tool_args.raw_text: UHF T-Band Radio System Replacement W32557 - This project's initial scope was to replace the Subways' UHF T-Band radio system

payload.project_name: UHF T-Band Radio System Replacement W32557
payload.description: Replaced scope with agreement to use Metropolitan Regional Radio System (MRRS) instead, reducing cost by $35M and schedule by 20 months. EAC $7M.

tool_args.label: Passenger Station Local Area Network (PSLAN)
tool_args.raw_text: These projects involve the installation of network access nodes on platforms and the expansion of Passenger Station Local Area Network (PSLAN) infrastructure

payload.project_name: Passenger Station Local Area Network (PSLAN) A37183 E34050/1
payload.description: Installation of network access nodes and expansion of PSLAN infrastructure for improved PA/Customer Information Screen systems, ADA, Elevator, and Escalator Programs. Budget $21M.
